description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block with a flat top and sides, featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running lengthwise across its upper surface. The grooves are deep and sharply defined, giving the block a ribbed appearance from above. The block is solid and monolithic, with a matte black coloration that suggests it is made from a dense, durable stone such as basalt or granite. The sides are smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the textured top. There are no visible signs of weathering, markings, or engravings on any surface. Its substantial size and robust construction indicate it is intended as a heavy-duty urban barrier or obstacle.
description: A large, black, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, solid sides. The block is robust and visually imposing, suitable for use as an urban barrier.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, grooved top surface and the smooth, solid front face of the block.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth and spacing of the parallel grooves on the top surface, with the left side of the block visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the grooved top and the smooth, solid rear face.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the ribbed texture of the top and the smooth right side.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a protective barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or placed directly on a leveled surface
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or erosion; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
